checks.note: Phase 7 draft schemas validate as JSON Schema Draft 2020-12.

SDK codegen manifest, public contract pack manifest, skeleton manifest, import boundary matrix, public schema catalog, agent tool manifest, and phase7 operation descriptors validate against draft schemas.
Candidate OpenAPI JSON parses, has unique operationIds, and its x-ofarm operation IDs are listed in the Phase 7 public surface manifest.
Candidate AsyncAPI JSON parses and includes OFARM event invariant that runtime events are notifications, not truth stores.
Python SDK stubs compile; TypeScript shape does not define forbidden SDK methods outside explicit negative examples/comments.
Skeleton manifests validate, apps are marked SDK-only, and forbidden import boundaries are declared.
No active baseline files were edited.
External OpenAPI/AsyncAPI conformance tools were not run in this environment.

notes: Phase 7 remains additive and implementation-facing. It does not promote draft material into active law.
